examples.title: Basic toolbar
examples.description: A named action bar that turns several controls into one Tab stop.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Toolbar from '@lostgradient/cinder/toolbar';
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';
</script>

<Toolbar aria-label="Document actions">
  <Toolbar.Group>
    <Button variant="secondary">Save</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Share</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Export</Button>
  </Toolbar.Group>
</Toolbar>

examples.title: Vertical toolbar
examples.description: Vertical orientation swaps the roving axis to Up and Down.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Toolbar from '@lostgradient/cinder/toolbar';
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';
</script>

<Toolbar aria-label="Canvas tools" orientation="vertical">
  <Toolbar.Group>
    <Button variant="secondary">Select</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Pen</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Comment</Button>
  </Toolbar.Group>
</Toolbar>

examples.title: Toolbar with groups
examples.description: Adjacent groups keep related controls together while the toolbar wraps.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Toolbar from '@lostgradient/cinder/toolbar';
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';
  import Segment from '@lostgradient/cinder/segment';
  import SegmentedControl from '@lostgradient/cinder/segmented-control';
</script>

<Toolbar aria-label="Preview controls">
  <Toolbar.Group>
    <SegmentedControl id="scale" label="Scale" hideLabel value="100" onchange={() => {}}>
      <Segment value="75">75%</Segment>
      <Segment value="100">100%</Segment>
      <Segment value="125">125%</Segment>
    </SegmentedControl>
  </Toolbar.Group>

  <Toolbar.Group>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Fit</Button>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Grid</Button>
  </Toolbar.Group>
</Toolbar>

examples.title: Toolbar with spacer
examples.description: Toolbar.Spacer pushes utility actions to the far edge.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import Toolbar from '@lostgradient/cinder/toolbar';
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';
</script>

<Toolbar aria-label="Editor actions">
  <Toolbar.Group>
    <Button variant="secondary">Bold</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Italic</Button>
    <Button variant="secondary">Link</Button>
  </Toolbar.Group>

  <Toolbar.Spacer />

  <Toolbar.Group>
    <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Preview</Button>
    <Button size="sm">Publish</Button>
  </Toolbar.Group>
</Toolbar>
